name: Classical
prompt: Classical instrumental music, refined and expressive mood, acoustic orchestra with strings, woodwinds, brass and percussion, flexible tempo with dynamic variation, structured composition with thematic development and natural concert hall acoustics.

name: Jazz
prompt: Jazz instrumental music, expressive and sophisticated mood, acoustic drum kit with ride cymbal, upright bass, piano and melodic horns, medium swing feel, improvised phrasing with live ensemble recording character.

name: Blues
prompt: Blues instrumental music, soulful and grounded mood, expressive guitar lines, bass and drum kit, slow to mid-tempo groove with shuffle feel, simple harmonic movement with warm raw production.

name: Soul
prompt: Soul instrumental music, warm and heartfelt mood, live drums, electric bass, keys and melodic leads, mid-tempo groove, rich chord movement with warm analog-style production.

name: Funk
prompt: Funk instrumental music, tight and groove-focused mood, syncopated electric bass, crisp drum kit, rhythm guitar and horn stabs, steady mid-tempo pocket, repetitive rhythm-driven structure with dry punchy mix.

name: Disco
prompt: Disco instrumental music, uplifting dancefloor mood, four-on-the-floor kick drum, bass guitar, rhythmic guitar and string layers, steady dance tempo, loop-based arrangement with polished bright production.

name: R&B
prompt: R&B instrumental music, smooth and intimate mood, electronic or live drums, warm bass, soft keys and melodic leads, slow to mid-tempo groove, song-oriented structure with clean modern production.

name: Hip Hop
prompt: Hip hop instrumental music, grounded and rhythmic mood, punchy kick and snare drums, deep sub bass and minimal melodic elements, steady mid-tempo rhythm, loop-based structure with clean modern production.

name: Electronic
prompt: Electronic instrumental music, driving and synthetic mood, drum machines, synthesizers and electronic bass, steady repetitive rhythmic pulse, loop-based structure designed for continuous playback, clean and controlled digital production.

name: Ambient
prompt: Ambient instrumental music, calm and immersive mood, sustained pads and evolving textures, very slow tempo or no rhythmic pulse, gradual harmonic movement, spacious reverberant sound design with wide stereo depth.

name: Pop
prompt: Pop instrumental music, bright and accessible mood, steady drums and bass, clear melodic hooks with synths or guitars, mid to up-tempo rhythm, verse-chorus structure with polished radio-ready production.

name: Rock
prompt: Rock instrumental music, energetic and driving mood, electric guitars, bass and acoustic drum kit, steady mid-tempo rhythm, song-based structure with live band production character.

name: Metal
prompt: Metal instrumental music, intense and aggressive mood, high-gain distorted guitars, heavy bass and powerful drum kit, fast driving rhythm with tight precision, riff-based structure with dense modern production.

name: Punk
prompt: Punk instrumental music, raw and rebellious mood, distorted guitars, bass and fast drum kit, very fast tempo, short direct structure with lo-fi aggressive production.

name: Folk
prompt: Folk instrumental music, warm and intimate mood, acoustic instruments with natural dynamics, gentle percussion and simple melodic lines, slow to mid-tempo rhythm, storytelling-oriented structure with organic acoustic recording.

name: Country
prompt: Country instrumental music, warm and grounded mood, acoustic and electric guitars, steady bass and drum kit, mid-tempo groove, clear melodic hooks with clean traditional production.

name: Latin
prompt: Latin instrumental music, lively and rhythmic mood, percussion-forward arrangement with bass and melodic instruments, syncopated dance rhythms, steady groove-based structure with bright energetic production.

name: Reggae
prompt: Reggae instrumental music, relaxed and steady mood, offbeat guitar skanks, deep bass and drum kit, slow to mid-tempo one-drop rhythm, groove-centered structure with warm spacious production.

name: World Music
prompt: World instrumental music, culturally rooted and expressive mood, regional acoustic instruments and traditional rhythmic patterns, non-western tonal colors, repetitive ceremonial or dance forms with natural organic production.
